title: shaqah #8248
definition:
1) to give to drink, irrigate, drink, water, cause to drink water
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to water, irrigate
        1a2) to water, give drink to
    1b) (Pual) to be watered
    1c) (Niphal) variant
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to give to drink, irrigate, drink, water, cause to drink water
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to water, irrigate
        1a2) to water, give drink to
    1b) (Pual) to be watered
    1c) (Niphal) variant

    NASB:  cause to drink water, give to drink
